channel.title: Services on Daniel Hicks
channel.description: Recent content in Services on Daniel Hicks

item.title: Services
item.description:
Currently, I offer the following services on a contractual basis:

  • Aerial footage collection for infrastructure, primary production, and natural landscape management.
  • Digital and technical solutions, including automated sensor circuit systems.
  • Public speaking and training for:
    • RPAS
    • Aviation (avionics and basic aeronautical knowledge)
    • Financial Literacy

If you would like to enquire about any of my services, you can contact me through my Linktree contact form.

✈️ Aerial Services (Drones)

With over 15 years of commercial RPAS operations and FPV system construction experience, I have the know-how and can-do skills to tackle any operation I’m equipped for. Do you have something you need footage of or visually inspected from the air? I’m available most weekends to offer my aerial services in Melbourne and the surrounding areas.
